headline: Morgan Flatley Joins Constellation Brands Board As Marketing Focus Grows
summary: Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) has appointed Morgan Flatley, a senior marketing leader from McDonald's Corporation, to its Board of Directors. Flatley will serve as an independent director, bringing experience in global brand building and consumer marketing. The appointment is part of Constellation Brands' ongoing board refreshment process. Constellation Brands, trading at $136.76, has seen the stock decline 7.4% over the past week and 10.5% over the past month. The share price is also...

headline: How McDonald’s is serving up culture as part of its new strategic plan
summary: Activations around a Nike sneaker release and box office smash “Backrooms” demonstrate how the fast-food giant uses social media marketing.

headline: McDonald’s unveils new ‘McDonald’s > NEXT’ growth strategy
summary: The new strategy will emphasise on automation and increasing the hospitality standards to support growth.

headline: How Is Chipotle Mexican Grill's Stock Performance Compared to Other Consumer Cyclical Stocks?
